zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Seymour於大約1430年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可時，他的父親John St. Maur, Esq.23歲，母親Elizabeth Brooke21歲。他和Phillipa Hungerford至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1489年10月26日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Seymour于大约1430年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可时，他的父亲John St. Maur, Esq.23岁，母亲Elizabeth Brooke21岁。他和Phillipa Hungerford至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1489年10月26日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特貝金頓 煙雨 斯坦德維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Seymour was born about 1430, in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John St. Maur, Esq., was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Brooke, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Phillipa Hungerford. He died on 26 October 1489, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Phillipa Hungerford. Il est décédé le 26 octobre 1489, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Beckington with Standerwick, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Seymour(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John St. Maur, Esq.(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Brooke(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Phillipa Hungerford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 10월 26일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 베킨그턴 위스 스탠더윅에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Seymour родился около 1430 г. в местности беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John St. Maur, Esq. было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Brooke, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Phillipa Hungerford. Он умер 26 октября 1489 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности беккингтон вит стандирвикк, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
